title: Parking Shark
tagline: A marketplace for renting the parking spot someone else is not using
summary: Built with a four-person UVA team, Parking Shark lets renters find and reserve neighborhood parking while hosts manage listings, availability, bookings, and reviews.
outcome: We built the complete renter and host flow around a 13-table MySQL model, then added a hosted workflow demo, conflict-safe reservations, role checks, tests, and CI.
